params: ctxt: the HTML parser context (supplies ctxt->input->cur/->end, charset, state)
len: out-parameter for the byte length of the decoded character
harness_callchain: LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput -> htmlReadMemory(docBuffer, docSize, ...) -> htmlDoRead -> htmlParseDocument -> htmlParseContent/htmlParseElement -> ... -> CUR_CHAR(l) macro (#define CUR_CHAR(l) htmlCurrentChar(ctxt, &l)) -> htmlCurrentChar; on a non-growable in-memory buffer a truncated UTF-8 lead byte at end-of-input makes the guarded cur[1]/cur[2]/cur[3] reads walk past ctxt->input->end.
